[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011110000 4
1 0001010001 3
2 1100000011 4
3 1001010111 6
4 1100001101 5
5 0100000001 2
6 1100011101 6
7 1111011001 7

01 0111100011 6

23 1111011011 8
34 1111111111 a
45 0011111101 7
56 1110101011 7
67 1011110111 8
70 1111111111 a

35 1011111101 8
